---
title: "descriptive_analysis_eboxes_primates"
author: "Josema"
date: "2026-02-03"
output: html_document
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
suppressPackageStartupMessages({
  library(dplyr)
  library(stringr)
  library(readr)
  library(purrr)
  library(stringi)
})
```


```{r setup, include=FALSE}
# =========================
# CONFIG
# =========================
in_dir  <- "~/primates_tree_fasta/fuzznuc"                  # carpeta donde están los .txt
pattern <- "_fuzznuc_eboxes\\.txt$"   # patrón de nombres
out_tsv <- file.path(in_dir, "bhlh_sites_all_with_ebox.tsv")
```


```{r setup, include=FALSE}
files <- list.files(in_dir, pattern = pattern, full.names = TRUE)
stopifnot(length(files) > 0)

cat("FILES FOUND:", length(files), "\n")
cat("EXAMPLE:", basename(files[1]), "\n\n")
```


```{r setup, include=FALSE}
# =========================
# 1) HELPERS
# =========================
suppressPackageStartupMessages({
  library(stringr)
  library(stringi)
})

revcomp_dna <- function(x) {
  chartr("ACGTNacgtn", "TGCANtgcan", stringi::stri_reverse(x))
}

# Correct bHLH halfsite representation: CAN-CAN
canon_bhlh_halfsites <- function(sixmer) {
  if (is.na(sixmer)) return(NA_character_)
  s <- toupper(sixmer)

  if (nchar(s) != 6L) return(NA_character_)
  if (!str_detect(s, "^[ACGT]{6}$")) return(NA_character_)

  left  <- substr(s, 1, 3)               # CAN
  right <- substr(s, 4, 6)               # NTG
  right_can <- revcomp_dna(right)        # -> CAN

  # sanity: both should be CAN
  if (!str_detect(left,  "^CA[ACGT]$")) return(NA_character_)
  if (!str_detect(right_can, "^CA[ACGT]$")) return(NA_character_)

  # order-invariant: CAA-CAG == CAG-CAA
  paste(sort(c(left, right_can)), collapse = "-")
}

# quick check
canon_bhlh_halfsites("CAAATG")  
canon_bhlh_halfsites("CATTTG") 


get_species_from_file <- function(path) {
  bn <- basename(path)
  bn <- str_replace(bn, pattern, "")
  bn <- str_replace(bn, "_fuzznuc_eboxes$", "")
  bn <- str_replace(bn, "_fuzznuc_eboxes\\.txt$", "")
  bn <- str_replace(bn, "_fuzznuc_eboxes", "")
  bn
}
```


```{r setup, include=FALSE}
# =========================
# 2) PRECOMPUTE: mapa 6-mer -> ebox (RÁPIDO)
# =========================
cat("STEP 2/6: building CANNTG -> ebox map (16 entries)...\n")

bases <- c("A","C","G","T")

# genera solo CANNTG
all6 <- expand.grid(N1 = bases, N2 = bases) |>
  transmute(motif = paste0("CA", N1, N2, "TG")) |>
  pull(motif)

ebox_map <- setNames(
  vapply(all6, canon_bhlh_halfsites, character(1)),
  all6
)

print(ebox_map)
cat("...done.\n\n")

```


```{r setup, include=FALSE}
# =========================
# 3) FUNCIÓN: CARGAR 1 FICHERO (solo lectura)
# =========================
read_one_raw <- function(path) {
  readr::read_tsv(
    path,
    col_types = cols(.default = col_character()),
    progress = FALSE
  )
}

# =========================
# 4) FUNCIÓN: LIMPIAR + MODIFICAR (sin ebox aún)
# =========================
clean_one <- function(df, species) {
  df %>%
    filter(SeqName != "SeqName") %>%        # quita headers colados
    mutate(
      species = species,
      Start   = suppressWarnings(as.integer(Start)),
      End     = suppressWarnings(as.integer(End)),
      Score   = suppressWarnings(as.numeric(Score)),
      Strand  = as.character(Strand),
      Pattern = as.character(Pattern),
      # quita "patternX:" delante
      motif6  = toupper(str_replace(Pattern, "^.*?:", ""))
    )
}

# =========================
# 5) FUNCIÓN: AÑADIR EBOX (lookup rápido)
# =========================
add_ebox <- function(df) {
  df %>%
    mutate(
      ebox = unname(ebox_map[motif6])
    )
}
```


```{r setup, include=FALSE}
# =========================
# 6) PIPELINE PASO A PASO CON FEEDBACK
# =========================
cat("STEP 3/6: reading files...\n")
raw_list <- vector("list", length(files))
names(raw_list) <- basename(files)

for (i in seq_along(files)) {
  f <- files[i]
  cat(sprintf("  [%d/%d] read %s ... ", i, length(files), basename(f)))
  raw_list[[i]] <- read_one_raw(f)
  cat("OK\n")
}
cat("\n")

cat("STEP 4/6: cleaning + extracting motif6...\n")
clean_list <- vector("list", length(files))
names(clean_list) <- basename(files)

for (i in seq_along(files)) {
  f <- files[i]
  sp <- get_species_from_file(f)
  cat(sprintf("  [%d/%d] clean %s (species=%s) ... ", i, length(files), basename(f), sp))
  clean_list[[i]] <- clean_one(raw_list[[i]], sp)
  cat("OK\n")
}
cat("\n")

cat("STEP 5/6: adding ebox column (fast lookup)...\n")
ebox_list <- vector("list", length(files))
names(ebox_list) <- basename(files)

for (i in seq_along(files)) {
  cat(sprintf("  [%d/%d] ebox %s ... ", i, length(files), names(clean_list)[i]))
  ebox_list[[i]] <- add_ebox(clean_list[[i]])
  cat("OK\n")
}
cat("\n")

write_rds(ebox_list, file.path(in_dir, "intermediate_ebox_list.rds"))

cat("STEP 6/6: binding all results + saving...\n")
all_bhlh <- bind_rows(ebox_list) %>%
  select(species, SeqName, Start, End, Score, Strand, Pattern, motif6, ebox, Mismatch)

readr::write_tsv(all_bhlh, out_tsv)
cat("SAVED -> ", out_tsv, "\n\n")

# mini resumen descriptivo
cat("SUMMARY: total rows =", nrow(all_bhlh), "\n")
print(all_bhlh %>% count(species, sort = TRUE) %>% head(10))
cat("\nTop eboxes overall:\n")
print(all_bhlh %>% count(species,ebox, sort = TRUE) %>%  pivot_wider(names_from = ebox, values_from = n), width=Inf, height=Inf)
write_csv(x = all_bhlh %>% count(species,ebox, sort = TRUE) %>%  pivot_wider(names_from = ebox, values_from = n), file = file.path(in_dir, "species_ebox_counts_wide.csv"))

```



# Funcions para hacer el liftover

```{r}
# ============================================================
# Liftover de una tabla multi-especie (species + coords) a hg38
# usando chains por especie: <species>ToHg38.over.chain(.gz)
# ============================================================

liftover_multispecies_to_hg38 <- function(df,
                                         chain_dir,
                                         species_col = "species",
                                         seq_col     = "SeqName",
                                         start_col   = "Start",
                                         end_col     = "End",
                                         strand_col  = "Strand",
                                         chain_suffix = "ToHg38.over.chain",
                                         allow_gz = TRUE,
                                         keep_cols = NULL,
                                         start_is_0_based = FALSE,
                                         split_size = 200000L) {

  stopifnot(requireNamespace("dplyr", quietly = TRUE))
  stopifnot(requireNamespace("rtracklayer", quietly = TRUE))
  stopifnot(requireNamespace("GenomicRanges", quietly = TRUE))
  stopifnot(requireNamespace("IRanges", quietly = TRUE))
  stopifnot(requireNamespace("S4Vectors", quietly = TRUE))

  df <- as.data.frame(df)

  # cols mínimas
  need <- unique(c(species_col, seq_col, start_col, end_col, strand_col))
  miss <- setdiff(need, colnames(df))
  if (length(miss) > 0) stop("Missing columns in df: ", paste(miss, collapse = ", "))

  # opcional: mantener solo ciertas cols
  if (!is.null(keep_cols)) {
    need2 <- unique(c(need, keep_cols))
    df <- df[, intersect(need2, colnames(df)), drop = FALSE]
  }

  # id estable para merge
  df_id <- df |>
    dplyr::mutate(row_id = dplyr::row_number())

  # tipos numéricos
  df_id[[start_col]] <- suppressWarnings(as.integer(df_id[[start_col]]))
  df_id[[end_col]]   <- suppressWarnings(as.integer(df_id[[end_col]]))

  # si tus coords eran BED (0-based), convertir a 1-based para GRanges
  if (isTRUE(start_is_0_based)) {
    df_id[[start_col]] <- df_id[[start_col]] + 1L
  }

  # filas válidas
  valid <- df_id |>
    dplyr::filter(
      !is.na(.data[[species_col]]),
      !is.na(.data[[seq_col]]),
      !is.na(.data[[start_col]]),
      !is.na(.data[[end_col]]),
      .data[[start_col]] > 0,
      .data[[end_col]] > 0,
      .data[[end_col]] >= .data[[start_col]]
    )

  df_id <- df_id |>
    dplyr::mutate(status = dplyr::if_else(row_id %in% valid$row_id, "to_liftover", "bad_input"))

  if (nrow(valid) == 0) {
    return(df_id |>
             dplyr::mutate(
               n_mapped = 0L,
               hg38_SeqName = NA_character_,
               hg38_Start = NA_integer_,
               hg38_End = NA_integer_,
               hg38_Strand = NA_character_,
               chain_used = NA_character_
             ) |>
             dplyr::select(-row_id))
  }

  # helper: localizar chain
  find_chain <- function(genome) {
    p1 <- file.path(chain_dir, paste0(genome, chain_suffix))
    p2 <- if (allow_gz) paste0(p1, ".gz") else NA_character_
    if (file.exists(p1)) return(p1)
    if (allow_gz && file.exists(p2)) return(p2)
    NA_character_
  }

  # helper: liftover por chunk (para no reventar RAM con objetos S4 gigantes)
  liftover_one_chunk <- function(chunk, ch_path) {
    ch <- rtracklayer::import.chain(ch_path)

    gr <- GenomicRanges::GRanges(
      seqnames = chunk[[seq_col]],
      ranges   = IRanges::IRanges(start = chunk[[start_col]], end = chunk[[end_col]]),
      strand   = chunk[[strand_col]]
    )
    GenomicRanges::mcols(gr)$row_id <- chunk$row_id

    lo <- rtracklayer::liftOver(gr, ch)
    nmap <- S4Vectors::elementNROWS(lo)

    mapped_idx <- which(nmap > 0)
    if (length(mapped_idx) == 0) {
      return(dplyr::tibble(
        row_id = integer(),
        n_mapped = integer(),
        hg38_SeqName = character(),
        hg38_Start = integer(),
        hg38_End = integer(),
        hg38_Strand = character()
      ))
    }

    mapped_gr <- unlist(lo[mapped_idx], use.names = FALSE)
    orig_rep  <- rep(mapped_idx, nmap[mapped_idx])

    GenomicRanges::mcols(mapped_gr)$row_id   <- GenomicRanges::mcols(gr)$row_id[orig_rep]
    GenomicRanges::mcols(mapped_gr)$n_mapped <- nmap[orig_rep]

    as.data.frame(mapped_gr) |>
      dplyr::transmute(
        row_id,
        n_mapped,
        hg38_SeqName = as.character(seqnames),
        hg38_Start   = start,
        hg38_End     = end,
        hg38_Strand  = as.character(strand)
      )
  }

  # procesar por especie (cada una con su chain)
  genomes <- sort(unique(valid[[species_col]]))

  mapped_all <- vector("list", length(genomes))
  names(mapped_all) <- genomes

  for (gi in seq_along(genomes)) {
    genome <- genomes[gi]
    ch_path <- find_chain(genome)

    if (is.na(ch_path)) {
      message(sprintf("[SKIP %d/%d] %s : no chain found", gi, length(genomes), genome))
      mapped_all[[gi]] <- dplyr::tibble(
        row_id = integer(),
        n_mapped = integer(),
        hg38_SeqName = character(),
        hg38_Start = integer(),
        hg38_End = integer(),
        hg38_Strand = character(),
        chain_used = character()
      )
      next
    }

    message(sprintf("[LIFT %d/%d] %s : %s", gi, length(genomes), genome, basename(ch_path)))

    sub <- valid |> dplyr::filter(.data[[species_col]] == genome)

    # chunking
    idx <- seq_len(nrow(sub))
    chunks <- split(idx, ceiling(idx / split_size))

    out_chunks <- vector("list", length(chunks))
    for (ci in seq_along(chunks)) {
      message(sprintf("  - chunk %d/%d (%d rows)", ci, length(chunks), length(chunks[[ci]])))
      out_chunks[[ci]] <- liftover_one_chunk(sub[chunks[[ci]], , drop = FALSE], ch_path)
    }

    mapped_all[[gi]] <- dplyr::bind_rows(out_chunks) |>
      dplyr::mutate(chain_used = basename(ch_path))
  }

  mapped_df <- dplyr::bind_rows(mapped_all)

  out <- df_id |>
    dplyr::left_join(mapped_df, by = "row_id") |>
    dplyr::mutate(
      n_mapped = dplyr::if_else(is.na(n_mapped), 0L, as.integer(n_mapped)),
      status = dplyr::case_when(
        status == "bad_input" ~ "bad_input",
        n_mapped > 0 ~ "mapped",
        TRUE ~ "unmapped"
      )
    ) |>
    dplyr::arrange(row_id, dplyr::desc(n_mapped)) |>
    dplyr::select(-row_id)

  out
}

```

# Aplicar el liftover

```{r}
suppressPackageStartupMessages({
  library(dplyr)
  library(readr)
  library(stringr)
})

in_tsv  <- "/users/genomics/josema/primates_tree_fasta/all_bhlh.tsv"
bed_dir <- "/users/genomics/josema/primates_tree_fasta/bed_by_species"
dir.create(bed_dir, recursive = TRUE, showWarnings = FALSE)

df <- read_tsv(in_tsv, show_col_types = FALSE)

# añade ID estable global para recuperar luego (no depende de ordenar)
df <- df %>% mutate(global_id = row_number())

species_vec <- sort(unique(df$species))
cat("Species:", length(species_vec), "\n")

for (i in seq_along(species_vec)) {
  sp <- species_vec[i]
  cat(sprintf("[%d/%d] %s\n", i, length(species_vec), sp))

  sub <- df %>% filter(species == sp)

  out_bed <- file.path(bed_dir, paste0(sp, ".bed"))

  if (sp == "hg38") {
    # hg38 no necesita liftover: aún así guardamos BED por consistencia (opcional)
    bed <- sub %>%
      transmute(
        chrom = SeqName,
        chromStart = as.integer(Start) - 1L,
        chromEnd   = as.integer(End),
        name = global_id
      )
    write_tsv(bed, out_bed, col_names = FALSE)
    next
  }

  # BED: 0-based start, end-exclusive
  bed <- sub %>%
    transmute(
      chrom = SeqName,
      chromStart = as.integer(Start) - 1L,
      chromEnd   = as.integer(End),
      name = global_id
    )

  write_tsv(bed, out_bed, col_names = FALSE)
}


```



```{r}
suppressPackageStartupMessages({
  library(dplyr)
  library(readr)
  library(stringr)
  library(rtracklayer)
  library(GenomicRanges)
  library(IRanges)
  library(S4Vectors)
})

# -------------------------
# CONFIG (AJUSTA)
# -------------------------
bed_dir   <- "/users/genomics/josema/primates_tree_fasta/bed_by_species"  # <species>.bed
chain_dir <- "/users/genomics/josema/primates_tree_fasta/chains"
base_tsv  <- "/users/genomics/josema/primates_tree_fasta/all_bhlh_with_global_id.tsv" 
out_dir   <- "/users/genomics/josema/primates_tree_fasta/liftover_tables_by_species"
dir.create(out_dir, recursive = TRUE, showWarnings = FALSE)

# columnas esperadas en base_tsv:
# species SeqName Start End Score Strand Pattern motif6 ebox global_id
id_col <- "global_id"

# -------------------------
# helpers
# -------------------------
find_chain <- function(sp) {
  p1 <- file.path(chain_dir, paste0(sp, "ToHg38.over.chain.gz"))
  p2 <- file.path(chain_dir, paste0(sp, "ToHg38.over.chain"))
  if (file.exists(p1)) return(p1)
  if (file.exists(p2)) return(p2)
  NA_character_
}

read_bed4 <- function(path) {
  x <- read_tsv(path, col_names = FALSE, show_col_types = FALSE, progress = FALSE)
  if (ncol(x) < 4) stop("BED needs >=4 cols: chrom start end name. File: ", path)
  x <- x[, 1:4]
  colnames(x) <- c("orig_chr", "orig_start0", "orig_end0", "name")
  x %>%
    mutate(
      orig_start0 = as.integer(orig_start0),
      orig_end0   = as.integer(orig_end0)
    )
}

# BED -> GRanges (R usa 1-based)
bed_to_gr <- function(bed4) {
  gr <- GRanges(
    seqnames = bed4$orig_chr,
    ranges   = IRanges(start = bed4$orig_start0 + 1L, end = bed4$orig_end0),
    strand   = "*"
  )
  mcols(gr)$name <- bed4$name
  gr
}

# liftOver result -> df (con start/end 1-based)
liftover_to_df <- function(lo) {
  nmap <- S4Vectors::elementNROWS(lo)

  mapped_idx <- which(nmap > 0)
  mapped_df <- tibble(
    name = character(),
    hg38_chr = character(),
    hg38_start = integer(),
    hg38_end = integer()
  )

  if (length(mapped_idx) > 0) {
    mapped_gr <- unlist(lo[mapped_idx], use.names = FALSE)
    orig_rep  <- rep(mapped_idx, nmap[mapped_idx])

    mcols(mapped_gr)$name <- mcols(unlist(lo, use.names = FALSE))$name
    # la línea de arriba no es fiable; mejor:
    # propagamos name desde el GR original afuera (lo hacemos en main con gr$name)

    mapped_df <- as.data.frame(mapped_gr) %>%
      transmute(
        hg38_chr = as.character(seqnames),
        hg38_start = start,
        hg38_end   = end
      )

    # name lo añadimos fuera con orig_rep usando el gr original
    mapped_df$orig_rep <- orig_rep
  }

  list(nmap = nmap, mapped_df = mapped_df)
}

# -------------------------
# MAIN
# -------------------------
base <- read_tsv(base_tsv, show_col_types = FALSE)
stopifnot(all(c("species","motif6","ebox", id_col) %in% colnames(base)))

# diccionario id -> motif6/ebox (para join rápido)
base_small <- base %>%
  select(species, !!sym(id_col), motif6, ebox)

beds <- list.files(bed_dir, pattern = "\\.bed$", full.names = TRUE)
stopifnot(length(beds) > 0)

for (i in seq_along(beds)) {
  bed_path <- beds[i]
  sp <- tools::file_path_sans_ext(basename(bed_path))
  message(sprintf("[%d/%d] %s", i, length(beds), sp))

  out_file <- file.path(out_dir, paste0(sp, "_liftoverToHg38.tsv"))

  bed4 <- read_bed4(bed_path) %>%
    mutate(species = sp)

  # une motif6/ebox desde la tabla base usando el ID
  # (si name en BED es numérico, lo igualamos al tipo del id_col)
  # intentamos convertir ambos a character para evitar líos
  bed4 <- bed4 %>% mutate(name = as.character(name))
  base_join <- base_small %>%
    filter(species == sp) %>%
    mutate(!!id_col := as.character(.data[[id_col]]))

  bed4 <- bed4 %>%
    left_join(base_join, by = setNames(id_col, "name"))

  # coords originales también en 1-based (por comodidad)
  bed4 <- bed4 %>%
    mutate(
      orig_start = orig_start0 + 1L,
      orig_end   = orig_end0
    )

  # hg38: no liftover
  if (sp == "hg38") {
    out <- bed4 %>%
      transmute(
        species,
        orig_chr, orig_start, orig_end,
        hg38_chr   = orig_chr,
        hg38_start = orig_start,
        hg38_end   = orig_end,
        motif6, ebox,
        n_mapped = 1L,
        status = "already_hg38"
      )
    write_tsv(out, out_file)
    next
  }

  chain_path <- find_chain(sp)
  if (is.na(chain_path)) {
    out <- bed4 %>%
      transmute(
        species,
        orig_chr, orig_start, orig_end,
        hg38_chr = NA_character_,
        hg38_start = NA_integer_,
        hg38_end = NA_integer_,
        motif6, ebox,
        n_mapped = 0L,
        status = "no_chain"
      )
    write_tsv(out, out_file)
    next
  }

  # liftover
  gr <- bed_to_gr(bed4)
  ch <- rtracklayer::import.chain(chain_path)
  lo <- rtracklayer::liftOver(gr, ch)
  nmap <- S4Vectors::elementNROWS(lo)

  # mapped rows (replica si multimap)
  mapped_idx <- which(nmap > 0)
  mapped_out <- tibble()

  if (length(mapped_idx) > 0) {
    mapped_gr <- unlist(lo[mapped_idx], use.names = FALSE)
    orig_rep  <- rep(mapped_idx, nmap[mapped_idx])

    # propaga el name del input
    mcols(mapped_gr)$name <- mcols(gr)$name[orig_rep]

    mapped_out <- as.data.frame(mapped_gr) %>%
      transmute(
        name = as.character(name),
        hg38_chr = as.character(seqnames),
        hg38_start = start,
        hg38_end   = end
      )
  }

  # n_mapped por input (name)
  nm_df <- tibble(name = as.character(mcols(gr)$name), n_mapped = as.integer(nmap))

  out <- bed4 %>%
    mutate(name = as.character(name)) %>%
    left_join(nm_df, by = "name") %>%
    left_join(mapped_out, by = "name") %>%
    mutate(
      n_mapped = if_else(is.na(n_mapped), 0L, n_mapped),
      status = case_when(
        n_mapped > 0 ~ "mapped",
        TRUE ~ "unmapped"
      )
    ) %>%
    transmute(
      species,
      orig_chr, orig_start, orig_end,
      hg38_chr, hg38_start, hg38_end,
      motif6, ebox,
      n_mapped, status
    )

  write_tsv(out, out_file)
  message("  -> saved: ", out_file)
}

message("DONE -> ", out_dir)


```


```{r}
suppressPackageStartupMessages({
  library(dplyr)
  library(readr)
  library(stringr)
})

# -------------------------
# CONFIG (AJUSTA)
# -------------------------
in_tsv  <- "/users/genomics/josema/primates_tree_fasta/all_bhlh.tsv"  # tu tabla original
bed_dir <- "/users/genomics/josema/primates_tree_fasta/bed_with_motif_by_species"
dir.create(bed_dir, recursive = TRUE, showWarnings = FALSE)

# columnas esperadas en in_tsv:
# species SeqName Start End Score Strand Pattern motif6 ebox

# -------------------------
# MAIN
# -------------------------
df <- read_tsv(in_tsv, show_col_types = FALSE)


need <- c("species","SeqName","Start","End","motif6","ebox")
miss <- setdiff(need, colnames(df))
if (length(miss) > 0) stop("Missing columns: ", paste(miss, collapse=", "))

species_vec <- sort(unique(df$species))

cat("Creating BEDs for", length(species_vec), "species\n\n")

for (i in seq_along(species_vec)) {

  sp <- species_vec[i]
  cat(sprintf("[%d/%d] %s\n", i, length(species_vec), sp))

  sub <- df %>%
    filter(species == sp) %>%
    mutate(
      Start = as.integer(Start),
      End   = as.integer(End)
    ) %>%
    filter(!is.na(Start), !is.na(End), Start > 0, End >= Start)

  # BED6 + ebox (extra col)
  bed <- sub %>%
    transmute(
      chrom  = SeqName,
      start0 = Start - 1L,      # BED 0-based
      end0   = End,
      name   = motif6,         # secuencia real
      score  = 0,              # requerido por BED6
      strand = if ("Strand" %in% names(sub)) Strand else "*",
      ebox   = ebox            # tipo CAN-CAN
    )

  out_file <- file.path(out_dir, paste0(sp, "_eboxes.bed"))

  write_tsv(bed, out_file, col_names = FALSE)

  cat("  -> rows:", nrow(bed), "\n")
}

cat("\nDONE ->", out_dir, "\n")

```



```{r}
suppressPackageStartupMessages({
  library(dplyr)
  library(readr)
  library(stringr)
  library(rtracklayer)
  library(GenomicRanges)
  library(IRanges)
  library(S4Vectors)
})

# -------------------------
# CONFIG (AJUSTA)
# -------------------------
bed_dir   <- "/users/genomics/josema/primates_tree_fasta/bed_with_motif_by_species"  # *.bed (7 cols)
chain_dir <- "/users/genomics/josema/primates_tree_fasta/chains"
out_dir   <- "/users/genomics/josema/primates_tree_fasta/bed_with_metadata_hg38_coords"
dir.create(out_dir, recursive = TRUE, showWarnings = FALSE)

# Si algún día quieres limitar tamaño de chunk por RAM:
chunk_size <- 2500000L

# -------------------------
# helpers
# -------------------------
find_chain <- function(sp) {
  p1 <- file.path(chain_dir, paste0(sp, "ToHg38.over.chain.gz"))
  p2 <- file.path(chain_dir, paste0(sp, "ToHg38.over.chain"))
  if (file.exists(p1)) return(p1)
  if (file.exists(p2)) return(p2)
  NA_character_
}

read_bed7 <- function(path) {
  x <- read_tsv(path, col_names = FALSE, show_col_types = FALSE, progress = FALSE)
  if (ncol(x) < 7) stop("Expected >=7 cols (chrom start0 end0 motif6 score strand ebox). File: ", path)
  x <- x[, 1:7]
  colnames(x) <- c("chrom","start0","end0","motif6","score","strand","ebox")
  x %>%
    mutate(
      start0 = as.integer(start0),
      end0   = as.integer(end0),
      motif6 = as.character(motif6),
      score  = suppressWarnings(as.integer(score)),
      strand = as.character(strand),
      ebox   = as.character(ebox)
    )
}

bed7_to_gr <- function(tbl) {
  # BED: start0 0-based, end0 end-exclusive
  # GRanges: start 1-based inclusive, end 1-based inclusive
  GRanges(
    seqnames = tbl$chrom,
    ranges   = IRanges(start = tbl$start0 + 1L, end = tbl$end0),
    strand   = tbl$strand
  )
}

# -------------------------
# MAIN
# -------------------------
bed_files <- list.files(bed_dir, pattern = "\\.bed$", full.names = TRUE)
stopifnot(length(bed_files) > 0)

for (i in seq_along(bed_files)) {
  f <- bed_files[i]
  sp <- sub("_eboxes\\.bed$|\\.bed$", "", basename(f))  # soporta calJac4_eboxes.bed o calJac4.bed
  message(sprintf("\n[%d/%d] %s", i, length(bed_files), sp))

  out_file <- file.path(out_dir, paste0(sp, "_with_hg38.tsv"))

  bed <- read_bed7(f) %>%
    mutate(
      species = sp,
      interval_id = paste0(sp, ":", chrom, ":", start0, "-", end0, ":", strand, ":", row_number())
    ) %>%
    filter(!is.na(chrom), !is.na(start0), !is.na(end0), start0 >= 0, end0 >= start0)

  # hg38: no liftover, copiar coords
  if (sp == "hg38") {
    out <- bed %>%
      transmute(
        species, interval_id,
        chrom, start0, end0, motif6, score, strand, ebox,
        hg38_chr    = chrom,
        hg38_start0 = start0,
        hg38_end0   = end0,
        hg38_key    = paste(hg38_chr, hg38_start0, hg38_end0, sep=":"),
        status      = "already_hg38",
        n_mapped    = 1L,
        chain_used  = NA_character_
      )
    write_tsv(out, out_file)
    message("  -> saved (already hg38): ", out_file)
    next
  }

  chain_path <- find_chain(sp)
  if (is.na(chain_path)) {
    out <- bed %>%
      transmute(
        species, interval_id,
        chrom, start0, end0, motif6, score, strand, ebox,
        hg38_chr    = NA_character_,
        hg38_start0 = NA_integer_,
        hg38_end0   = NA_integer_,
        hg38_key    = NA_character_,
        status      = "no_chain",
        n_mapped    = 0L,
        chain_used  = NA_character_
      )
    write_tsv(out, out_file)
    message("  -> saved (no chain): ", out_file)
    next
  }

  # importar chain una vez
  ch <- rtracklayer::import.chain(chain_path)

  idx <- seq_len(nrow(bed))
  chunks <- split(idx, ceiling(idx / chunk_size))

  mapped_rows <- vector("list", length(chunks))

  for (ci in seq_along(chunks)) {
    message(sprintf("  - chunk %d/%d (%d rows)", ci, length(chunks), length(chunks[[ci]])))

    bsub <- bed[chunks[[ci]], , drop = FALSE]
    gr <- bed7_to_gr(bsub)

    # pega metadata para que sobreviva al unlist del liftOver
    mcols(gr)$species      <- bsub$species
    mcols(gr)$interval_id  <- bsub$interval_id
    mcols(gr)$chrom        <- bsub$chrom
    mcols(gr)$start0       <- bsub$start0
    mcols(gr)$end0         <- bsub$end0
    mcols(gr)$motif6       <- bsub$motif6
    mcols(gr)$score        <- bsub$score
    mcols(gr)$strand0      <- bsub$strand
    mcols(gr)$ebox         <- bsub$ebox

    lo <- rtracklayer::liftOver(gr, ch)
    nmap <- S4Vectors::elementNROWS(lo)

    midx <- which(nmap > 0)
    if (length(midx) == 0) {
      mapped_rows[[ci]] <- tibble()
      next
    }

    mapped_gr <- unlist(lo[midx], use.names = FALSE)

    mapped_rows[[ci]] <- as.data.frame(mapped_gr) %>%
      transmute(
        species     = mcols(mapped_gr)$species,
        interval_id = mcols(mapped_gr)$interval_id,

        chrom  = mcols(mapped_gr)$chrom,
        start0 = mcols(mapped_gr)$start0,
        end0   = mcols(mapped_gr)$end0,
        motif6 = mcols(mapped_gr)$motif6,
        score  = mcols(mapped_gr)$score,
        strand = mcols(mapped_gr)$strand0,
        ebox   = mcols(mapped_gr)$ebox,

        hg38_chr    = as.character(seqnames(mapped_gr)),
        hg38_start0 = start(mapped_gr) - 1L,
        hg38_end0   = end(mapped_gr),

        n_mapped = 1L,                 # cada fila aquí es un mapping válido
        chain_used = basename(chain_path)
      )
  }

  mapped_df <- bind_rows(mapped_rows)

  # UNMAPPED: todas las originales con NA en hg38 y n_mapped=0
  # (si una original mapea a múltiples sitios, se queda igualmente en mapped_df
  #  y NO queremos duplicarla como unmapped)
  mapped_ids <- if (nrow(mapped_df) > 0) unique(mapped_df$interval_id) else character()

  unmapped_df <- bed %>%
    filter(!(interval_id %in% mapped_ids)) %>%
    transmute(
      species, interval_id,
      chrom, start0, end0, motif6, score, strand, ebox,
      hg38_chr    = NA_character_,
      hg38_start0 = NA_integer_,
      hg38_end0   = NA_integer_,
      n_mapped    = 0L,
      chain_used  = basename(chain_path)
    )

  out <- bind_rows(mapped_df, unmapped_df) %>%
    mutate(
      status = if_else(n_mapped > 0, "mapped", "unmapped"),
      hg38_key = if_else(!is.na(hg38_chr),
                         paste(hg38_chr, hg38_start0, hg38_end0, sep=":"),
                         NA_character_)
    )

  write_tsv(out, out_file)

  summ <- out %>% count(status) %>% arrange(desc(n))
  message("  -> saved: ", out_file, " | ", paste0(summ$status, "=", summ$n, collapse=" ; "))
}

message("\nDONE -> ", out_dir)

```





full join 





```{r}
# Full-join gigante por hg38_key, optimizado (data.table)
# Output: una fila por hg38_key
#         + por especie: <sp>_id y <sp>_ebox
#
# Asume que cada fichero por especie tiene al menos:
#   hg38_key, interval_id, ebox, status
# (si no tienes status, quita el filtro status == "mapped")

suppressPackageStartupMessages({
  library(data.table)
})

# -------------------------
# CONFIG (AJUSTA)
# -------------------------
in_dir  <- "/users/genomics/josema/primates_tree_fasta/bed_with_metadata_hg38_coords"
out_tsv <- file.path(in_dir, "ALL_species_fulljoin_by_hg38key.tsv.gz")

# Patrón de ficheros (ajusta si tus nombres son distintos)
files <- list.files(in_dir, pattern = "_with_hg38\\.tsv$", full.names = TRUE)
stopifnot(length(files) > 0)

# Extraer species del filename: "<species>_with_hg38.tsv"
get_species <- function(path) sub("_with_hg38\\.tsv$", "", basename(path))

# -------------------------
# Helper: leer y reducir 1 especie a (hg38_key, sp_id, sp_ebox)
#         colapsa multi-mapping por hg38_key con ';'
# -------------------------
read_one_species_compact <- function(path) {
  sp <- get_species(path)
  message("[READ] ", sp, " -> ", basename(path))

  # leer SOLO columnas necesarias (fread es la más rápida)
  dt <- fread(path, select = c("hg38_key", "interval_id", "ebox", "status"))

  # quedarte solo con mapped y con key válida
  # (si no tienes status, comenta esa línea)
  dt <- dt[status == "mapped" & !is.na(hg38_key) & hg38_key != ""]

  # por si hay duplicados exactos
  dt <- unique(dt, by = c("hg38_key", "interval_id", "ebox"))

  # compacta a una fila por hg38_key en esa especie
  # (si en un hg38_key hay varias filas, las juntamos)
  dt_comp <- dt[, .(
    tmp_id   = paste(unique(interval_id), collapse = ";"),
    tmp_ebox = paste(unique(ebox), collapse = ";")
  ), by = hg38_key]

  setnames(dt_comp, c("tmp_id", "tmp_ebox"), c(paste0(sp, "_id"), paste0(sp, "_ebox")))
  setkey(dt_comp, hg38_key)

  dt_comp
}

# -------------------------
# Leer y mergear incrementalmente (full join)
# -------------------------
message("Files: ", length(files))
dts <- vector("list", length(files))

for (i in seq_along(files)) {
  message(sprintf("[STEP %d/%d] %s", i, length(files), basename(files[i])))
  dts[[i]] <- read_one_species_compact(files[i])

  # liberar memoria cuanto antes
  gc()
}

# Full join por hg38_key
message("Merging all species tables (full join)...")
merged <- Reduce(function(x, y) merge(x, y, by = "hg38_key", all = TRUE), dts)

# Ordena por hg38_key (opcional)
setkey(merged, hg38_key)

# Guardar (gz comprimido)
message("Writing: ", out_tsv)
fwrite(merged, out_tsv, sep = "\t", na = "NA", compress = "gzip")

message("DONE: rows=", nrow(merged), " cols=", ncol(merged))

```

# alternativa rapida 



```{r}
suppressPackageStartupMessages({
  library(data.table)
  library(stringr)
  library(tidyverse)
})

in_dir <- "/users/genomics/josema/primates_tree_fasta/bed_with_metadata_hg38_coords"
files  <- list.files(in_dir, pattern = "_with_hg38\\.tsv$", full.names = TRUE)

stopifnot(length(files) > 0)

get_sp <- function(f) sub("_with_hg38\\.tsv$", "", basename(f))

# Lee y colapsa 1 especie -> long table: (hg38_key, species, id, ebox)
read_one_long <- function(f) {
  sp <- get_sp(f)
  message("[READ] ", sp)

  dt <- fread(f, select = c("hg38_key", "interval_id", "ebox", "status"))

  # solo mapeados y con key válida
  dt <- dt[status == "mapped" & !is.na(hg38_key) & hg38_key != ""]

  if (nrow(dt) == 0) {
    return(data.table(hg38_key=character(), species=character(), id=character(), ebox=character()))
  }

  # dedup por si hay repetidos exactos
  dt <- unique(dt, by = c("hg38_key", "interval_id", "ebox"))

  # colapsa a 1 fila por hg38_key (por especie)
  out <- dt[, .(
    id   = paste(unique(interval_id), collapse = ";"),
    ebox = paste(unique(ebox), collapse = ";")
  ), by = hg38_key]

  out[, species := sp]
  setcolorder(out, c("hg38_key", "species", "id", "ebox"))
  out
}

# 1) construir tabla long (apilada)
long <- rbindlist(lapply(files, read_one_long), use.names = TRUE, fill = TRUE)

# 2) wide para IDs
wide_id <- dcast(long, hg38_key ~ species, value.var = "id")
setnames(wide_id, old = setdiff(names(wide_id), "hg38_key"), new = paste0(setdiff(names(wide_id), "hg38_key"), "_id"))

# 3) wide para eboxes
wide_ebox <- dcast(long, hg38_key ~ species, value.var = "ebox")
setnames(wide_ebox, old = setdiff(names(wide_ebox), "hg38_key"), new = paste0(setdiff(names(wide_ebox), "hg38_key"), "_ebox"))

# 4) merge final (solo 1 merge)
setkey(wide_id, hg38_key)
setkey(wide_ebox, hg38_key)
final <- wide_id[wide_ebox]

# guardar
out_file <- file.path(in_dir, "ALL_species_by_hg38key_id_ebox_optimizado.tsv.gz")
fwrite(final, out_file, sep = "\t", na = "NA", compress = "gzip")
message("DONE -> ", out_file, " | rows=", nrow(final), " cols=", ncol(final))

```


# COPIAR LOS CAMBIOS!!! "backup_historial.txt"

```{r}

```


#ASOCIAR CREs FROM ZOONOMIA


```{r}
andrews_data <- readxl::read_xlsx('/projects_ng/tfm_lia/andrews/Data S1.xlsx')
```

```{r}
andrews_data %>% count(Group)
```



```{r}
suppressPackageStartupMessages({
  library(data.table)
  library(readxl)
  library(stringr)
  library(GenomicRanges)
  library(IRanges)
})

final2 <- as.data.table(final2)
stopifnot("hg38_key" %in% names(final2))

andrews_path <- "/projects_ng/tfm_lia/andrews/Data S1.xlsx"
andrews <- as.data.table(readxl::read_xlsx(andrews_path))
stopifnot(all(c("Chrom","Start","Stop","Group") %in% names(andrews)))

andrews[, `:=`(
  Chrom = as.character(Chrom),
  Start = as.integer(Start),
  Stop  = as.integer(Stop),
  Group = as.character(Group)
)]
andrews <- andrews[!is.na(Chrom) & !is.na(Start) & !is.na(Stop) & Stop >= Start]

# por si Andrews viniese sin "chr"
andrews[!startsWith(Chrom, "chr"), Chrom := paste0("chr", Chrom)]

gr_a <- GRanges(
  seqnames = andrews$Chrom,
  ranges   = IRanges(start = andrews$Start, end = andrews$Stop)
)
mcols(gr_a)$Group <- andrews$Group

# -------------------------
# PARSER hg38_key (dos formatos)
# A) chr10:100000055:100000058
# B) hg38:chr10:100000427-100000433:+:1885542
# -------------------------

key <- final2$hg38_key

chr <- start <- end <- rep(NA_character_, length(key))

# A) chr:start:end (tu caso actual)
mA <- str_match(key, "^(chr[^:]+):([0-9]+):([0-9]+)$")
isA <- !is.na(mA[,1])
chr[isA]   <- mA[isA,2]
start[isA] <- mA[isA,3]
end[isA]   <- mA[isA,4]

# B) hg38:chr:start-end:...
mB <- str_match(key, "^(hg38:)?(chr[^:]+):([0-9]+)-([0-9]+):([+-]):([0-9]+)$")
isB <- !is.na(mB[,1]) & !isA
chr[isB]   <- mB[isB,3]
start[isB] <- mB[isB,4]
end[isB]   <- mB[isB,5]

start <- suppressWarnings(as.integer(start))
end   <- suppressWarnings(as.integer(end))

valid <- !is.na(chr) & !is.na(start) & !is.na(end) & end >= start
message("Parsed valid hg38_key: ", sum(valid), " / ", nrow(final2))

# Si tu hg38_key viene de BED0 (start0), para GRanges 1-based sería start+1
# Como no sabemos, probamos primero sin shift:
gr_q <- GRanges(seqnames = chr[valid], ranges = IRanges(start = start[valid], end = end[valid]))
mcols(gr_q)$row_i <- which(valid)

hits <- findOverlaps(gr_q, gr_a, ignore.strand = TRUE)
message("Overlaps (no shift): ", length(hits))

# Si sale 0, prueba shift +1 (BED0 -> 1-based)
if (length(hits) == 0) {
  gr_q <- GRanges(seqnames = chr[valid], ranges = IRanges(start = start[valid] + 1L, end = end[valid]))
  mcols(gr_q)$row_i <- which(valid)
  hits <- findOverlaps(gr_q, gr_a, ignore.strand = TRUE)
  message("Overlaps (+1 shift): ", length(hits))
}

# añadir columnas a final2
final2[, andrews_overlap := FALSE]
final2[, andrews_groups := NA_character_]

if (length(hits) > 0) {
  dt_hits <- data.table(
    row_i = mcols(gr_q)$row_i[queryHits(hits)],
    Group = mcols(gr_a)$Group[subjectHits(hits)]
  )
  agg <- dt_hits[, .(andrews_groups = paste(unique(Group), collapse=";")), by=row_i]

  final2 <- final2 %>% mutate(row_i=1:n())
  final2 <- final2 %>%  left_join(agg, by = "row_i") 
}

final2[, .N, by = andrews_overlap]




```

# upsetplot 



```{r}
# UpSet-like con 3 paneles:
# (abajo) matriz de sets
# (medio) barplot total (counts, sin color)
# (arriba) barplot 0-1 (porcentaje accesible, stacked accessible vs not_accessible)

count_table <- final2 %>% count(andrews_groups.y, summit_intersect)

suppressPackageStartupMessages({
  library(dplyr)
  library(stringr)
  library(tidyr)
  library(ggplot2)
  library(patchwork)
})

plot_dir <- "/users/genomics/josema/primates_tree_fasta/plots"
dir.create(plot_dir, recursive = TRUE, showWarnings = FALSE)

canon_combo <- function(x) {
  ifelse(is.na(x) | x == "",
         NA_character_,
         vapply(strsplit(as.character(x), ";", fixed = TRUE),
                function(v) paste(sort(unique(v)), collapse = ";"),
                character(1)))
}

# ---- 1) Canon + resumen por combo ----
ct <- count_table %>%
  mutate(combo = canon_combo(andrews_groups.y)) %>%
  group_by(combo, summit_intersect) %>%
  summarise(n = sum(n), .groups = "drop")

combo_summ <- ct %>%
  group_by(combo) %>%
  summarise(
    total = sum(n),
    accessible = sum(n[summit_intersect == TRUE], na.rm = TRUE),
    not_accessible = sum(n[summit_intersect == FALSE], na.rm = TRUE),
    .groups = "drop"
  ) %>%
  mutate(
    acc_prop = if_else(total > 0, accessible / total, NA_real_)
  ) %>%
  arrange(desc(total))

combo_order <- combo_summ$combo

# ---- 2) Panel ARRIBA: porcentaje (0-1) stacked ----
prop_df <- combo_summ %>%
  transmute(
    combo = factor(combo, levels = combo_order),
    accessible_prop = if_else(total > 0, accessible / total, 0),
    not_accessible_prop = if_else(total > 0, not_accessible / total, 0)
  ) %>%
  tidyr::pivot_longer(
    cols = c(accessible_prop, not_accessible_prop),
    names_to = "accessibility",
    values_to = "prop"
  ) %>%
  mutate(accessibility = recode(accessibility,
                                accessible_prop = "accessible",
                                not_accessible_prop = "not_accessible"))

p_top <- ggplot(prop_df, aes(x = combo, y = prop, fill = accessibility)) +
  geom_col() +
  theme_classic() +
  labs(x = NULL, y = "Fraction", title = "Accessibility fraction (0–1)") +
  scale_y_continuous(limits = c(0, 1), expand = expansion(mult = c(0, 0.02))) +
  theme(
    axis.text.x = element_blank(),
    axis.ticks.x = element_blank()
  )

# ---- 3) Panel MEDIO: total counts (sin color) ----
p_mid <- combo_summ %>%
  mutate(combo = factor(combo, levels = combo_order)) %>%
  ggplot(aes(x = combo, y = total)) +
  geom_col(fill = "grey30") +
  geom_text(aes(label = total), vjust = -0.5, size = 3) +
  theme_classic() +
  labs(x = NULL, y = "Count", title = "Total per combination") +
  theme(
    axis.text.x = element_blank(),
    axis.ticks.x = element_blank()
  )

# ---- 4) Panel ABAJO: matriz UpSet ----
sets <- c("group-1","group-2","group-3","other")

mat <- tibble(combo = combo_order) %>%
  mutate(parts = strsplit(as.character(combo), ";", fixed = TRUE)) %>%
  tidyr::unnest_longer(parts) %>%
  mutate(present = TRUE) %>%
  filter(parts %in% sets) %>%
  distinct(combo, set = parts, present)

mat <- tidyr::expand_grid(
  combo = combo_order,
  set = sets
) %>%
  left_join(mat, by = c("combo","set")) %>%
  mutate(
    present = if_else(is.na(present), FALSE, present),
    combo = factor(combo, levels = combo_order),
    set = factor(set, levels = rev(sets))
  )

p_bot <- ggplot(mat, aes(x = combo, y = set)) +
  geom_point(aes(alpha = present), size = 4) +
  scale_alpha_manual(values = c(`FALSE` = 0.1, `TRUE` = 1), guide = "none") +
  theme_classic() +
  labs(x = "Andrews group combination", y = NULL) +
  theme(axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1))

# ---- 5) Combine ----
p <- p_top / p_mid / p_bot + plot_layout(heights = c(1.2, 1.4, 1))

ggsave(
  filename = file.path(plot_dir, "upset_andrews_combos_3panel.png"),
  plot = p,
  width = 13,
  height = 9,
  dpi = 300
)

p


```

# asociar a regiones 

```{r}
suppressPackageStartupMessages({
  library(GenomicRanges)
  library(GenomicFeatures)
  library(GenomeInfoDb)
  library(IRanges)
  library(TxDb.Hsapiens.UCSC.hg38.knownGene)
})

# ---- 0) Parsear "chr10:106257188:106257194" -> chr/start/end ----
# CAMBIA "region" por tu columna real
if (!all(c("chr","start","end") %in% names(final2))) {
  stopifnot("hg38_key" %in% names(final2))

  parts <- strsplit(final2$hg38_key, ":", fixed = TRUE)
  final2$chr   <- vapply(parts, `[`, character(1), 1)
  final2$start <- as.integer(vapply(parts, `[`, character(1), 2))
  final2$end   <- as.integer(vapply(parts, `[`, character(1), 3))
}

# ---- 1) TxDb + features ----
txdb <- TxDb.Hsapiens.UCSC.hg38.knownGene

genes_gr   <- genes(txdb)
exons_gr   <- exons(txdb)
introns_gr <- unlist(intronsByTranscript(txdb), use.names = FALSE)
promoters_gr <- promoters(genes_gr, upstream = 2000, downstream = 500)

# ---- 2) GRanges input ----


final2 <- final2%>%mutate(row_i=1:n())  # clave de fila estable

gr <- GRanges(seqnames = final2$chr, ranges = IRanges(final2$start, final2$end))
mcols(gr) <- final2

# Normaliza estilo chr (evita 0 hits por mismatch)
seqlevelsStyle(gr) <- "UCSC"
seqlevelsStyle(genes_gr) <- "UCSC"
seqlevelsStyle(exons_gr) <- "UCSC"
seqlevelsStyle(introns_gr) <- "UCSC"
seqlevelsStyle(promoters_gr) <- "UCSC"

common <- intersect(seqlevels(gr), seqlevels(genes_gr))
gr <- keepSeqlevels(gr, common, pruning.mode = "coarse")
genes_gr <- keepSeqlevels(genes_gr, common, pruning.mode = "coarse")
exons_gr <- keepSeqlevels(exons_gr, common, pruning.mode = "coarse")
introns_gr <- keepSeqlevels(introns_gr, common, pruning.mode = "coarse")
promoters_gr <- keepSeqlevels(promoters_gr, common, pruning.mode = "coarse")

# ---- 3) Annotation type ----
hits_prom   <- overlapsAny(gr, promoters_gr, ignore.strand = TRUE)
hits_exon   <- overlapsAny(gr, exons_gr,      ignore.strand = TRUE)
hits_intron <- overlapsAny(gr, introns_gr,   ignore.strand = TRUE)

feature <- ifelse(hits_prom, "promoter",
           ifelse(hits_exon, "exon",
           ifelse(hits_intron, "intron", "intergenic")))

# ---- 4) nearest gene + distancia (sin desalinear filas) ----
nearest <- distanceToNearest(gr, genes_gr, ignore.strand = TRUE)

near_df <- data.frame(
  row_i = queryHits(nearest),
  nearest_gene_id = genes_gr$gene_id[subjectHits(nearest)],
  nearest_gene_distance = mcols(nearest)$distance
)

# ---- 5) Output final (manteniendo TODAS las filas) ----
base_df <- data.frame(
  row_i = gr$row_i,
  chr = as.character(seqnames(gr)),
  start = start(gr),
  end = end(gr),
  feature = feature
)

orig_df <- as.data.frame(mcols(gr))
orig_df$row_i <- gr$row_i

final2_annot <- merge(
  merge(orig_df, base_df, by = "row_i", all.x = TRUE, sort = FALSE),
  near_df, by = "row_i", all.x = TRUE, sort = FALSE
)

# vuelve al orden original y limpia row_i
final2_annot <- final2_annot[order(final2_annot$row_i), ]
final2_annot$row_i <- NULL
```

```{r}
final2_annot %>% count(feature)

```

# DE_genes

```{r}
DE_genes<-readRDS('/projects_ng/COMPARATIVE_GENOMICS/Joshy_et_al_2024/ALL_DEX_13_01_25.rds')
```

```{r}
suppressPackageStartupMessages(library(org.Hs.eg.db))

final2_annot$nearest_gene_id <- as.character(final2_annot$nearest_gene_id)

final2_annot$nearest_gene_symbol <- mapIds(
  org.Hs.eg.db,
  keys = final2_annot$nearest_gene_id,
  keytype = "ENTREZID",
  column = "SYMBOL",
  multiVals = "first"
)
```

```{r}
final2_annot %>% filter(feature=='promoter') %>% filter(nearest_gene_symbol %in% DE_genes$gene) %>% distinct(nearest_gene_symbol)
```
